title: Warranty
description: Adds a Warrenty Enchantment, Which when an item enchanted with Warranty reaches zero durability, it is fully restored instead of breaking, consuming one level of the Warranty enchantment in the process.
body:
**Tired of your tools snapping mid-mining session?**
The **Warranty** enchantment gives your gear a second (or third!) life—literally.

## 🔹 What It Does
The Warranty enchantment prevents items from breaking when their durability reaches 0. Instead, the item is fully repaired and one level of Warranty is consumed. This cycle continues until all levels are used.

- 📈 Each level of Warranty = 1 extra full durability bar
  
- 🔄 Automatically repairs items on breaking
  
- 🧱 Works on all damageable items
  
- ⚖️ Cheaper to obtain than Unbreaking, but it does run out
## 🧩 Compatibility
- Minecraft 1.21.5
  
- Compatible with most other datapacks and vanilla features
  
- **WARNING** not compatible with other New Life Enchants without our compatiblity Datapack.
